title: Our work "Classification by Attention: Scene Graph Classification with Prior Knowledge" has been accepted to the 35th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence.
The preprint of our work "Classification by Attention: Scene Graph Classification with Prior Knowledge" is now available on arXiv.
Our work "Improving Visual Relation Detection using Depth Maps" has been accepted to International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2020).
The codes of our project "Improving Visual Relation Detection using Depth Maps" are now available on github Depth-VRD.
Started collaborating with Prof. Volker Tresp and Sahand Sharifzadeh on the research topic of Scene Graph Generation and Visual Relation Detection.
A new Vehicle Recognition web page with a Tensorflow.js demonstration has been launched: www.sinabaharlou.com/VehicleRecognition.
The paper "Transfer learning approach for classification and noise reduction on noisy web data" is published on the journal of Expert Systems with Applications (ESWA).
Submitted the Paper "Transfer learning approach for classification and noise reduction on noisy web data" to the journal of Expert Systems with Applications (ESWA).
Started working on the Vehicle Recognition Project.
Graduated from Sapienza University of Rome.
